title: Accrue 1,000 dSolar
description: Reach increasingly higher levels of energy production! To complete this quest, have at least 1,000 dSolar in your inventory.

dialogue.text: As you've probably noticed, you've been accruing dSolar as you generate energy with your panels! dSolar is basically just a token recording how much energy you've generated using solar historically. To make things a bit moe interesting, I'm going to give you increasingly bigger milestones to reach. Let's start small, with say, 1,000 dSolar. Before you know it you'll be a small blip on the Kardashev scale!
Keep going until you reach the goal!
See, that wasn't so bad! I'll be back with more quests for you soon. In the meantime, keep generating energy!
